session.user: Run `make lint ty` from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report results. This is a fail-fast phase to catch linting and type errors early.
session.assistant: I'll run the lint and type checking commands from the repository root.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run linting and type checking with make

session.tool_result: uv run ruff check All checks passed! uv run ty check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
Success: All linting and type checks passed
Both `ruff check` and `ty check` completed successfully with no violations or type errors found.
- **ruff check**: All checks passed! - **ty check**: All checks passed!
